name: create_upload_preset
description: Create a reusable upload preset that defines default upload parameters like folder, tags, transformations, and access control. Presets simplify uploads by bundling common settings.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the upload preset.

parameters.name: unsigned
parameters.description: If true, allows unsigned uploads from client-side code.

parameters.name: folder
parameters.description: Default folder to upload assets to.

parameters.name: transformation
parameters.description: Default transformations to apply on upload.

parameters.name: allowed_formats
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of allowed file formats.
